profile.focus_description: Building scalable web applications with Next.js 15, exploring advanced React patterns, and contributing to open-source projects. Always learning and staying up-to-date with the latest web technologies and design trends.

how_i_build.title: How I Build
how_i_build.subtitle: My approach for building modern, maintainable, and scalable applications with React & Next.js.
how_i_build.note: Note: This page highlights the basic React & Next.js concepts I use in this portfolio. My experience goes well beyond these—let's talk if you want to know more!
how_i_build.component_desc: A component is a reusable, self-contained piece of UI. In React, everything is a component, from buttons to entire pages. Components help you organize your code and make it modular.
how_i_build.component_why: Shows that I write modular and maintainable code.
how_i_build.state_desc: State is data that changes over time in your application. React's useState hook lets you add state to your components, enabling interactivity.
how_i_build.state_why: I can build interactive and dynamic UIs.
how_i_build.effect_desc: Effects let you run code in response to changes in your component (like fetching data or setting up a timer). React's useEffect hook is used for this.
how_i_build.effect_why: I know how to handle side effects and asynchronous logic.
how_i_build.context_desc: Context provides a way to pass data through the component tree without having to pass props manually at every level.
how_i_build.context_why: I can build scalable state management solutions.
how_i_build.memo_desc: useMemo and useCallback help optimize performance by memoizing values and functions to avoid unnecessary re-renders.
how_i_build.reducer_desc: useReducer is useful for managing complex state logic that involves multiple sub-values or when the next state depends on the previous one.
how_i_build.reducer_why: I can efficiently manage complex state logic.
how_i_build.props_desc: Props are how you pass data from a parent component to a child component. They make your components flexible and reusable.
how_i_build.props_why: I build flexible and reusable components.
how_i_build.routing_desc: Next.js uses file-based routing. Every file in the 'app' or 'pages' directory becomes a route. This makes navigation and code organization simple.
how_i_build.routing_why: I organize projects for scalability and easy navigation.
how_i_build.ssr_desc: Next.js lets you render pages on the server (SSR) or at build time (SSG) for better performance and SEO.
how_i_build.ssr_why: I care about performance and SEO.
